# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kong admin api exposed and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong.conf
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl
database = postgres
pg_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_port = 5432
pg_database = kong
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on
prefix = /usr/local/kong/
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_worker_connections = 16384
nginx_http_keepalive_timeout = 600
nginx_proxy_timeout = 600
nginx_proxy_connect_timeout = 600
nginx_proxy_send_timeout = 600
nginx_proxy_read_timeout = 600
status_listen = 127.0.0.1:8100
admin_gui_listen = 127.0.0.1:8003
admin_gui_ssl = on
admin_gui_ssl_cert = /path/to/cert.pem
admin_gui_ssl_cert_key = /path/to/key.pem
admin_gui_url = https://localhost:8003
admin_gui_access_log = /var/log/kong/admin_gui_access.log
admin_gui_error_log = /var/log/kong/admin_gui_error.log
admin_api_access_log = /var/log/kong/admin_api_access.log
admin_api_error_log = /var/log/kong/admin_api_error.log
proxy_access_log = /var/log/kong/proxy_access.log
proxy_error_log = /var/log/kong/proxy_error.log
nginx_main_conf = /etc/kong/nginx.conf
nginx_http_conf = /etc/kong/nginx_http.conf
nginx_stream_conf = /etc/kong/nginx_stream.conf
nginx_http_ssl_conf = /etc/kong/nginx_http_ssl.conf
nginx_stream_ssl_conf = /etc/kong/nginx_stream_ssl.conf
nginx_http_ssl_verify_conf = /etc/kong/nginx_http_ssl_verify.conf
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_conf = /etc/kong/nginx_stream_ssl_verify.conf
nginx_http_ssl_verify_depth = 2
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_depth = 2
nginx_http_ssl_verify_host = on
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_host = on
nginx_http_ssl_verify_peer = on
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_peer = on
nginx_http_ssl_verify_callback = on
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_callback = on
nginx_http_ssl_verify_callback_module = /usr/lib/kong/modules/ssl_verify_callback.so
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_callback_module = /usr/lib/kong/modules/ssl_verify_callback.so
nginx_http_ssl_verify_callback_function = verify_callback
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_callback_function = verify_callback
nginx_http_ssl_verify_callback_args = 1
nginx_stream_ssl_verify_callback_args = 1
